description: BIP341/BIP86 key-path (merkle root = None) known-answer vectors pinning the frost->rust-bitcoin bridge (KEY-03). Externally auditable against the BIPs' own published vectors.
source: BIP341 wallet-test-vectors.json, scriptPubKey[0] (scriptTree: null => merkle root None => BIP86 key-only output key Q = P + H_taproot(P).G).
parity_note: Even-Y normalization negates the point (x,y)->(x,-y), which preserves the x-coordinate. Therefore an odd-Y-origin key and its even-Y normalization share the same x-only internal key, the same BIP86 output key Q, and the same address. The odd-Y-origin entry reuses the published even-Y address as its independent post-normalization reference (D-10/D-11, Assumption A7).
